zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Littleton於大約1395年出生在英國武斯特斯爾福藍可利時，她的父親Thomas Littleton39歲，母親Maud Quartermain17歲。她於1414年與Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾福藍可利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1483年8月23日在她的家鄉享年89歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Littleton于大约1395年出生在英国武斯特斯爾福藍可利时，她的父亲Thomas Littleton39岁，母亲Maud Quartermain17岁。她于1414年与Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾福藍可利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1483年8月23日在她的家乡享年89岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Littleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, mostly in southwestern England, named in Old English as ‘small settlement’, from lȳtel ‘small’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Littleton was born about 1395, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, her father, Thomas Littleton, was 39 and her mother, Maud Quartermain, was 17. She married Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton in 1414, in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 23 August 1483, in her hometown, at the age of 89, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Littleton est née environ 1395, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Littleton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Maud Quartermain, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton en 1414, à Frankley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 août 1483, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Littleton um 1395 in Frankley, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Littleton 39 und ihre Mutter Maud Quartermain 17. Sie hat 1414 in Frankley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. August 1483 im Alter von 89 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Littleton è nata il circa 1395 nel Frankley, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas Littleton, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Maud Quartermain, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton nel 1414, nel Frankley, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 agosto 1483, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Littletonが約1395年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Littletonは39歳，母Maud Quartermainは17歳であった。1414年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフランクリーでSir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttleltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1483年8月23日に故郷で89歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Littleton(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Littleton(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Quartermain(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 프랭클리에서 Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1483년 8월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Littleton nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Littleton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Maud Quartermain, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton em 1414, em Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1483, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Littleton родилась около 1395 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Littleton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Quartermain, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton в 1414 г. в местности фрэнкли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 23 августа 1483 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Littleton nació aproximadamente 1395, en Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Littleton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Maud Quartermain, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Westcote de Lyttlelton en 1414, en Frankley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1483, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
